Name: Mech Station

Active Effect: Recruit 1 unit for free upto your rank

Active Effect: Place the lowest ranked soldier into lane, bench the active unit with its gear

Active Effect: players can purchase units during combat directly into the lane this turn only

Active Effect: reduce -2 Tech costs of mechs, -3 Tech cost of Vehicles for this turn only

Passive Effect: Tech costs can be covered by Organics
Active Effect: Tech costs can be covered by Organics for this turn

Name: Combined Arms
Passive Effect: Unlocks Mechs and Vehicles

Active Effect: Half Costs rounded up for one round, Double costs on following round

Active Effect: Recruit units from top of deck into each lane, return them to bottom of deck after combat

Name: Work Order

Active Effect: Draw 3 cards, Discard 2 cards and gain their cost in resources.
